name: Video Downloader
description: Download videos or audio from YouTube, Vimeo, Twitter, TikTok, and 1000+ more sites
doc:
Download media from online platforms.

Supported Sites:
• YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion
• Twitter/X, TikTok, Instagram
• 1000+ more sites via yt-dlp

Modes:
• Video - full video download
• Audio - audio track only (MP3)

Options:
• Quality selection (best, 1080p, 720p, etc.)
• Time range (start/end seconds)

Outputs:
File path, duration, and video dimensions.

inputs.name: Video URL
inputs.description: URL of the video to download (supports 1000+ sites)

inputs.name: Mode
inputs.description: Download mode: 'video' for full video, 'audio' for audio only

inputs.name: End Time
inputs.description: End time in seconds (leave empty for full video)

outputs.name: Video/Audio
outputs.description: Path to the downloaded video or audio file

outputs.name: Duration
outputs.description: Duration of the media in seconds

outputs.name: Width
outputs.description: Video width in pixels (video mode only)

outputs.name: Height
outputs.description: Video height in pixels (video mode only)
